subtitle: Point your camera at each thing you sell and set the price. You can add more any time.
err_price: Enter a price for this item
err_save: Could not save — please try again
ready_subtitle_one: 1 item set up. One last step — activate your till to start selling.
ready_subtitle: {count} items set up. One last step — activate your till to start selling.
activate_subtitle: Pay for your till and start selling today.
activate_items_saved: Your items are saved and ready.
activate_still_pending: Payment not confirmed yet. If you already paid, wait a moment and check again.
activate_success_subtitle: Everything is set. Go make your first sale.
activate_cancelled_subtitle: No problem — everything you set up is saved. Try again when you’re ready.
activate_err: Something went wrong — please try again
fork_title: How do you keep track today?
fork_title_named: How do you keep track today, {name}?
fork_subtitle: Set up in a minute — either way, your camera does the work.
fork_have_desc: A price list, another app, or your Instagram/TikTok shop — bring it all in at once.
fork_fresh_desc: Add each thing you sell with a photo and a price.
import_cta: I already have a list — bring it in
import_subtitle: Point your camera at a list you already have — a price list, a menu, another app's screen, or your shop on Instagram or TikTok. We'll read it all in one go.
import_none: Couldn't read any items — try to get the whole list in frame, with good light.
import_failed: Something went wrong — please try again.
import_review_hint: Check each one and fix anything that's wrong. Prices you can't see yet you can set to 0 and change later.
import_csv: Coming from another app? Upload its file
import_csv_none: Couldn't read products from that file. Export your items from your old app as a CSV and try again.
team_subtitle: Add anyone who will use the till. Each person gets their own login. You pay one seat per person.
team_pin_hint: You set this and give it to them. They log in with the phone/email above + this PIN.
team_err_save: Could not save — please try again
team_pending_note: Pay {price}/mo more to give them a login.
